title: Inflated Gear
description: Inflated Gear adds balloon-inspired weapons, tools, and armor. Blast damage into knockback, pop trees into leaf confetti, till fields with gusts, and watch ores float free. Light, magical gear for playful but powerful adventures.
body:
# 🎈 Inflated Gear

Step into the skies with the legendary relics of the **Balloon Knights** — a whimsical order who turned every battle into a carnival of clouds and every farm into a field of wind-swept wonder.

Inflated Gear brings you **magical, balloon-themed armor and tools** that bend the rules of Minecraft:

* Take a hit? You’re blasted back instead of hurt.
* Swing a hammer? Foes go flying skyward.
* Farm the land? Till fields in gusts of wind and whisper crops into sudden bloom.
* Chop a tree? Leaves scatter and pop like confetti.

Light, fragile, yet powerful — these tools don’t just change how you play, they change how the world feels. ✨

---

## ✨ Features

### 🛡️ Balloon Armor Set

* Converts all incoming damage (from entites) into proportional **knockback** instead of health loss.

### ⚔️ Tools

**Skyward Slammer (Hammer)**

* Right-clicking on the ground launches enemies upward.

**Helium Harvester (Pickaxe)**

* Ores mined float in place until collected.

**Puff Digger (Shovel)**

* Right-click ability removes gravity-affected blocks (sand, gravel, concrete powder, etc.).
* Config file allows adding/removing which blocks are affected.

**Zephyr Hoe**

* **Gust Till:** Right-click tills a configurable radius (default 3×3) and hydrates soil.
* **Breezy Growth:** Sneak + right-click → nearby crops receive random growth ticks.
* Configurable cooldowns, radius, durability cost, moisture, particles.

**Popper Chopper (Axe)**

* **Gust Defoliate:** Sneak + right-click → instantly clears connected leaves (vein-miner style).
* Respects Silk Touch & Fortune.
* Configurable radius, leaf cap, durability cost, cooldown, and natural-leaves-only toggle.

Anyone is free to use this Mod in a public modpack w/o asking permission (Must be hosted on curseforge or modrinth).
